nasb.text: Our enemies said, “They will not know or see until we come among them, kill them and put a stop to the work.”

esv.text: And our enemies said, “They will not know or see till we come among them and kill them and stop the work.”

cnv.text: 同時我們的敵人說：“趁著他們不知道，還未看見之前，我們就進入他們中間，殺死他們，使那工程停止。”

ccb.text: 我们的敌人说：“我们要趁他们不知不觉，进入他们中间杀死他们，阻止他们的工作。”
